steps.title: Identify what the student's goal requires
steps.content: The student wants to “emphasize the order in which the super continents were formed”—this requires showing which supercontinent formed first and which formed later.

steps.title: Determine which choice shows temporal order
steps.content:
B accomplishes this by explicitly stating that Euramerica formed “long after” Vaalbara, establishing clear temporal order.

A, C, and D instead focus on the general process, a single supercontinent, or shared definitions—none establishing relative sequence.

This matches choice B — B is correct.
